## Description (EN)

Bidder is PEP-controlled and a related party is sanctioned — combined signal.

## Description (FR)

Le soumissionnaire est contrôlé par une PPE et une partie liée figure sur une liste de sanctions.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Transaction with PEP-sanctioned — the counterparty is both a PEP AND on a sanctions list. Compound signal exceeding the strength of either alone.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.55 + weight 0.95 — compound indicators.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Stale PEP / sanctions data** races where one list updated and the other did not.

## Production wiring

✅ Production-ready. ANIF-PEP + sanctions adapter chain.
